case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE MARTINEZ MAGANA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ MAGANA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE MARTINEZ MAGANA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50.00 SERVED NOV-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ MAGANA, JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ MAGANA, JOSE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
